description: Flightless crow-folk cursed to speak only in mimicked sounds, yearning to reclaim stolen wings.
subraces: Urban scavengers mimicking city sounds and running thieves' guilds from the rooftops.
Darker-plumed kin drawn to omens, graveyards, and the whispered secrets of the dead.
Compulsive hoarders of shiny trinkets whose nests glitter with stolen baubles.
